title: Multiplex Nested PCR for Vibrio Cholera
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"biidd","text":"Primers targeting various regions of the V. Cholera genome were obtained from the literature or designed, and optimized for a multiplex nested PCR assay. materials_text: {"blocks":[{"key":"chflt","text":"  ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[{"key":0,"offset":0,"length":1}],"data":{}},{"key":"a9q7j","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"956vq","text":"Approximate total cost per sample: £0.9","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":39}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"7bf37","text":"17 primers required (cost excluded from estimate as primers do not need to be ordered each time)","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"1tdcu","text":"Dreamtaq cost per sample: ~£0.45 per sample, per PCR run\n","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"81hp1","text":"Extra equipment required:","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":25}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"7q4qr","text":"Vortex, mini centrifuge, thermocycler","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"e23m2","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{"0":{"type":"reagents","mutability":"MUTABLE","data":{"id":255319,"guid":"4222A764341F11EE9D4302C0B41BC903","name":"DreamTaq PCR Master Mix (2X)","mol_weight":0,"sku":"K1072","url":"https://www.thermofisher.com/order/catalog/product/K1072","cas_number":"","rrid":"","vendor":{"id":440,"name":"Thermo Fisher","link":"https://www.thermofisher.com","is_requested":false,"image":{"source":"/img/vendors/440.png","placeholder":"/img/vendors/440.png"}},"is_public":true,"can_edit":false}}}}
steps: Assemble primer pool: %s %s Bands for the V. cholera reactions: %s %s Reconstitute primers to 100 µM using nuclease-free water (or if primer manufacturer recommends otherwise, follow their recommendations for reconstituting primers). Create working stocks of 10 µM using nuclease-free water. Create 10 µM primer pools C and D by mixing together 10 µL of each primer marked as being part of the pool. Scale up as needed.

V. cholera first round PCR reaction DreamTaq PCR Master Mix (2X) Thermo Fisher Catalog #K1072 Prepare the following Master mix on ice in a 1.5ml Eppendorf Lobind tube per number of samples/controls + 10%: %s %s Briefly vortex and centrifuge down the master mix and aliquot 20 µL into each PCR tube. Add 5 µL of extracted DNA from each sample to a tube. Briefly vortex, and centrifuge down the PCR mixes.
Amplify using the following cycling conditions: %s %s

V. Cholera second round PCR reaction Prepare the following Master mix on ice in a 1.5ml Eppendorf Lobind tube per number of samples/controls + 10%: %s %s Briefly vortex and centrifuge down the master mix and aliquot 20 µL into each PCRtube. Add 5 µL of first round amplicon and vortex briefly to mix. Briefly centrifuge down the PCR mixes.
Check amplicons using an agarose gel or tapestation.
Amplify using the following cycling conditions: %s %s
creator: Shannon Fitz
